chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the table, all entries prior to 2009 have an empty back of shirt sponsor field. Starting in 2009–2011, a back sponsor appears (PSU Technology Group), and subsequent periods also have back sponsors. Therefore, the last year without a back sponsor is 2008.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
Reviewing the "back of shirt sponsor" column, all entries up to and including 2008 are blank (no back sponsor). Starting in 2009–2011, a back sponsor appears (PSU Technology Group), followed by subsequent back sponsors in 2011–2013 and 2013–present. Therefore, the most recent year without a back sponsor is 2008, matching the Prediction Answer.
